span.p: Component View: Forge v2 - Phase & Brain Skills

span.div:
Runs the final unify + demo
iteration

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Calls query() each iteration
(loads the dev/unifier skill)

span.div:
Advances the council one step
via SDK

Writes new themes + cycle
archive via

span.div:
Writes the demo bundle + PR
description to the worktree

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Anthropic's agent runtime +
harness (model calls, tool
use, prompt caching). Every
forge agent runs here; forge
hosts no model runtime,
vector DB, or harness of its
own.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
A side-project git repo forge
develops (trafficGame,
terraform-provider-betterado,
claude-harness...). Has its
own quality gate and its own
Brain 3. Worktrees branch
from it.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
External tree-sitter
knowledge-graph tool.
Rebuilds the three brain
graphs, triggered by a
post-commit hook.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
The hot path: a persistent
scheduler that claims
initiatives and runs them
through five in-cycle phases,
isolated per git worktree,
recoverable by heartbeat.
Caps its own surface area by
design (ADRs 011-013).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Decompose an initiative into
atomic work items with
given-when-then ACs and
explicit dependencies.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Drive a single work item to
green via the Ralph loop.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Prove cross-WI acceptance,
author the structured demo +
PR body.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Post-merge retrospective:
read the event log + merged
tree, write brain themes +
cycle archive.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Turn ideas + roadmap + brain
into an initiative via a
CEO/eng/design/DX council
that escalates only taste
decisions.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Author a Playwright
before/after behavioural
demo; backfill screenshots
when the change is visual.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Read the brain (graph-first,
then keyword). Mandated first
action of every planner + the
reflector; logs gaps.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
The only writer: append _raw
sources, create/update theme
pages, sync category indexes.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Structural integrity checks
over the brain (frontmatter,
index-sync, staleness,
orphans, length).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Maintain the three structural
graphs by wrapping the
graphify CLI.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Append-only per-cycle JSONL
event log plus snapshotted
work-items / demo /
REPORT.md. The replayable
source of truth for
reflection, the UI, and
metrics.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
A Karpathy-style LLM wiki
rendered as an Obsidian
vault, in three scopes. Each
scope has _raw/ (immutable),
themes/ (~15-60 line pages),
category indexes, and a
graphify graph.
